description: Composition Pink floral printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a U-neck with silver tape detailing, stylish yoke in pink with pin tucks and silver stitch detailing, short sleeves with silver tape detailing and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water with similar colours Do not bleach or dry clean Tumble dry low Warm iron Inspired by floral print and crafted in classic cuts, this kurta from vishudh makes for a fab addition to your ethno-modern wardrobe. The pin tucked placket and silver tape detailing add zing to this garment. Team it with jeans, leggings or loose pyjamas and heeled slippers. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5'7" and chest 33"
